description.description: Defines the human-readable description for the SSL certificate, providing context or purpose; must be unique and can include up to 63 characters.

managed.description: Defines the type of SSL certificate to create; set to `true` for a managed certificate or `false` for unmanaged.

name.description: Specifies the name of the SSL certificate. Must be unique within the project and comply with RFC1035.

timeouts.description: Defines the amount of time to wait for operations related to the managed SSL certificate, including creation, update, and deletion.

type.description: Defines the type of SSL certificate, either 'SELF_MANAGED' for user-provided certificates or 'MANAGED' for Google-managed certificates.
